channel.title: Deploy Frontity to Heroku
channel.description: Hello everybody, After pushing the code into Heroku, it seems everything is correct, but when I open the app, I see just a white page without content. Do you have any idea which could be the problem? thanks

item.title: Deploy Frontity to Heroku
item.dc:creator: jordigarreta11
item.description:
Hello everybody,
After pushing the code into Heroku, it seems everything is correct, but when I open the app, I see just a white page without content. Do you have any idea which could be the problem? thanks

Read full topic
